instruction:
Assume that the observation sample is $x [ n ]=A+w [ n ], \ n=0, 1, \ldots, N-1$ , where $A$ is an unknown constant and $w [ n ]$ is Gaussian white noise , it is known that $s=x [ 0 ]+x [ 1 ]+\ldots+x [ N-1 ]$ is a complete and sufficient statistic of $A$, then the minimum variance unbiased estimate of $\hat {A}$ is:____________.

Options:
A. $\hat{A}=\frac{s+1} {N}$
B. $\hat{A}=Ns$
C. $\hat{A}=\frac{s} {N-1}$
D. $\hat{A}=\frac{s} {N+1}$
E. $\hat{A}=\frac{s} {N}$
F. $\hat{A}=\frac{s} {2N}$
G. $\hat{A}=s-\frac{1} {N}$
H. $\hat{A}=\frac{2s} {N}$
I. $\hat{A}=\frac{s} {N}+\frac{1} {N}$
J. $\hat{A}=s$
